video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic medium shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm ambient lighting. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, firmly steadies a damaged metal shield on a wooden workbench. Beside them, Ari Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt, carefully guides a repair tool across the shield surface. Cooperative teamwork, detailed textures, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous cinematic shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge. Ari Mistfell, the crafter with ash-smudged gloves, taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Ari Ironleaf, the ranger, maintains a steady, supportive grip on the shield's edge. Warm forge glow, friendly and focused expressions, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts non-sexual professional cooperation in a fantasy setting. No hazardous materials or unsafe practices are shown; all actions are focused on tool-based repair. No text or watermarks included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is overwhelmed with damaged vanguard gear; Ari Ironleaf assists Ari Mistfell with manual stabilization while the crafter performs repairs.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Shared effort in the forge builds mutual reliability.
Appreciation for the ranger's assistance during a high-stress repair period.
